_description: Declarative manifest of GitHub Actions secrets that MUST be scoped to the 'production' environment. Consumed by tools/audit_gha_env_secrets.py and the Phase 4 continuous auditor. Every job in .github/workflows/*.yml declaring `environment: production` that references ${{ secrets.X }} has X listed here.

required_secrets.name: COORDINATION_INTERNAL_API_KEY
required_secrets.purpose: Internal API key for calling the deploy_intake /validate/approval endpoint from the E57 approval gate. Must match the value held by devops-coordination-api Lambda environment variable of the same name. Rotation MUST update both repo-level and environment-level scopes to avoid stale-secret drift.
required_secrets.origin: devops-coordination-api Lambda config (aws lambda get-function-configuration --function-name devops-coordination-api --query Environment.Variables.COORDINATION_INTERNAL_API_KEY)

notes: ENC-LSN-032: GitHub Actions environment-scoped jobs do NOT reliably inherit repo-level secrets. Repo-only secrets can resolve to empty string with no error, producing unexpected 401/403 responses. This manifest is the source-of-truth for tooling.

ENC-ISS-244: When adding a new `environment: production` job or a new secret reference to an existing env-scoped job, append to required_secrets[] in the same PR and ensure the secret is explicitly scoped via `gh secret set --env production`.
Phase 5 (ENC-TSK-E70) pre-merge guard uses this manifest to fail CI when a PR introduces an env-scoped secret reference that is not declared here.
